runs/lanes/ball_b1b2_prep_20260721/focused_suite_fix1.junit.xml:1 and wide_suite_fix1.junit.xml:1 record the 76-test focused and 4,304-case full runs; wide_suite_comparison_fix1.json names every failure-set difference.

full_suite.failure_notes: 31 failure identities are enumerated in wide_suite_comparison_fix1.json comparison.common_failures and exactly recur in the B0 fix2 baseline. Two are current-only versus that baseline: tests.racketsport.test_dead_code_audit::test_dead_code_audit_has_no_unknown_python_source_surfaces (targeted rerun and standalone 605-source/0-unknown audit pass) and tests.racketsport.test_flight_simulator::test_generate_corpus_is_deterministic_and_fast_for_small_cpu_sample (5.94s full, 6.84s combined rerun, 5.72s standalone versus <5.0s; same identity already failed in the pre-fix lane full run). The baseline-only scalar-Magnus failure now passes. No failure is in an owned file, but all 33 are not proven at clean HEAD.

honest_issues: Six of seven production pb.vision source videos are absent. The real B1 build therefore stopped at MISSING_MEDIA with zero rows and did not measure agreement. PBV_BALL_INSUFFICIENT_AGREEMENT would be emitted only after a real completed build lands below 1,000 rows or five sources; it is not claimed for this no-attempt.
The exact 2,372-step production WASB/CUDA pinned-HEAD comparison was not run because this host has no CUDA. The seven-step CPU result proves the comparison harness, not production parity.

The full racketsport suite is non-green: 4,246 passed, 33 failed, 25 skipped. Exact failure identities differ from the B0 fix2 baseline by two current-only failures even though neither touches owned code; failures_all_preexisting remains false.

The repository storage-policy audit remains red on unrelated dirty-tree state: six unknown large tracked holdout artifacts, the staged xkadsq9bli3h media file, and one already-missing allowed CVAT video. Scaffold indexing and dead-code audits pass.
Official WASB replay is mandatory in the production verifier and covered by deterministic fixture/adversarial tests, but a real seven-video replay could not run without the missing media.
The live LoSO result is tested-on-real-data plumbing evidence only. Its pooled F1@20 is 0.5670 and ball_verified remains false; it is not a BALL promotion.
VERIFIED=0 remains binding. No best-stack change, training run, or promotion was made.
next: Stage the six missing canonical media objects on a CUDA host, rerun the unchanged production B1 command, and report PBV_BALL_INSUFFICIENT_AGREEMENT if the completed independent-WASB counts miss 1,000 rows or five sources. Only after a PASS manifest should B2 training run; separately execute the exact 2,372-step pinned-HEAD production parity on CUDA.
